$curated: State-composition gate for flashcard-editor (Template B — flashcard-editor.gen.json has 0 MxCard; it is a FORM, so this asserts the keyed control SET per state, not MxCard identity). Chrome (screen / appbar / save) is excluded (matches dashboard.states.json — save lives in the appbar trailing, not state-driven by the body). The only state-DIFFERENTIATING keyed nodes are dup-add + dup-view (the duplicate banner, rendered only when _duplicateTerm != null); add-meaning / hidden-switch / audio-play render in every form state. Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/flashcard/flashcard_editor_states_test.dart. Gated states: create (no banner) + duplicate (banner). COVERAGE GAPS (same node-set as create, not separately gated): edit (title + prefill only), validation (inline errorText, no node change), multi-meaning (a secondary meaning field is added dynamically — not literal-keyed), audio (only the audio-play icon/content changes). Identity-rollout gaps (kit nodes not yet keyed in the FE — see intent-ledger.identityRollout.flashcard-editor): audio, cancel, hidden, meaning, meaning-2, term. NOTE (term): when it is keyed/built, declare keyboardType — Term = TextInputType.text (OS-locale IME per _sourceLang(), e.g. Korean), Meaning = TextInputType.multiline; the kit's flat DOM declares no IME to parity against, so the FE is source of truth here. flashcard-editor.slots.json intentionally omitted: the keyed nodes are controls (button/icon/switch) with no bound text slot; form labels/fields are unkeyed.
